zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary de Mobberley於1301年出生在英國爾莫波利時，她的父親William Mobberly18歲，母親Maud Downes22歲。她於大約1318年與Nicholas Leicester在英國爾塔波結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年在英國爾瑟 奧福享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary de Mobberley于1301年出生在英国爾莫波利时，她的父亲William Mobberly18岁，母亲Maud Downes22岁。她于大约1318年与Nicholas Leicester在英国爾塔波结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年在英国爾瑟 奧福享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mobberley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moverley
meanings: English: a Yorks variant of   Mobberley  .

variants.name: Moberly
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from Mobberley in Cheshire. The placename derives from Old English mōt ‘meeting’ + burg ‘fortress’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Moberley
meanings: English (Worcestershire and Hampshire): variant of   Moberly  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary de Mobberley was born in 1301, in Mobberley, Cheshire, England, her father, William Mobberly, was 18 and her mother, Maud Downes, was 22. She married Nicholas Leicester about 1318, in Tabley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1361, in Nether Peover, Cheshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary de Mobberley est née en 1301, à Mobberley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Mobberly, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Maud Downes, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Leicester environ 1318, à Tabley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1361, à Nether Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary de Mobberley 1301 in Mobberley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Mobberly 18 und ihre Mutter Maud Downes 22. Sie hat um 1318 in Tabley, Cheshire, England Nicholas Leicester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1361 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Nether Peover, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Mobberley è nata il nel 1301 nel Mobberley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William Mobberly, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Maud Downes, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Leicester circa 1318, nel Tabley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1361, nel Nether Peover, Cheshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Mobberleyが1301年にイギリスチェシュアイアモバーリーで生まれた時，父William Mobberlyは18歳，母Maud Downesは22歳であった。約1318年にイギリスチェシュアイアタブリーでNicholas Leicesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年にイギリスチェシュアイアネスエル ペオバーで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Mobberley(이)가 1301년 영국 체실르 모브벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Mobberly(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Downes(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1318년 영국 체실르 타블리에서 Nicholas Leicester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 영국 체실르 네터 p오버에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Mobberley nasceu em 1301, em Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Mobberly, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Maud Downes, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Leicester aproximadamente 1318, em Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1361, em Nether Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary de Mobberley родилась в 1301 г. в местности моббирли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Mobberly было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Downes, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Leicester около 1318 г. в местности табли, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1361 г. в местности нетир пеовир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary de Mobberley nació en 1301, en Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Mobberly, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Maud Downes, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Nicholas Leicester aproximadamente 1318, en Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1361, en Nether Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
